title: St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal
tagline: St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal, Kerala

overview.short: St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George's Syro-Malabar Forane Church is a Catholic pilgrimage church in Kulathuvayal, Perambra, Kozhikode, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kulathuvayal
topPlaces.description: Kulathuvayal is a place near Perambra in Kozhikode district of Kerala state, India. Administratively, Kulathuvayal comes under the Chakkittapara panchayat, Perambra block panchayat and Koyilandy Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Chakkittapara
topPlaces.description: Chakkittapara is a panchayat in the Kozhikode district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Kottur, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Kottur is a grama panchayat and a community development block in the Kozhikode district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Peruvannamuzhi
topPlaces.description: Peruvannamuzhi or Peruvannamoozhy is a village in Chakkittapara Panchayath Kozhikode district, Kerala, India. Peruvannamuzhi forms part of the newly inaugurated Malabar Wildlife Sanctuary and is rich in flora and fauna.

topPlaces.name: Koorachundu
topPlaces.description: Koorachundu is a village towards the north east of Kozhikode district of Kerala in India.

topPlaces.name: Koothali
topPlaces.description: Koothali is a village near Perambra in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India, and the traditional seat of the Koothali Nair. The name Koothali has evolved from two terms: Kooth + Ali, in which "Kooth" means performing arts like "Kathakali", "Koodiyattam", etc., and "Ali" means the venue where such art forms are performed.

topPlaces.name: Perambra
topPlaces.description: Perambra is a major town in Koyilandy taluk of Kozhikode district in North Malabar region of Kerala state, India. Perambra is the anglicized form of the original name Payyormala, given during British rule.

topPlaces.name: Puttad
topPlaces.description: Puttad(പുറ്റാട്) is a village in Koyilandy sub-district, about 5 km (3.1 mi) south of Perambra in Kozhikode district, Kerala, India.

items.note: Kulathuvayal is a place near Perambra in Kozhikode district of Kerala state, India. Administratively, Kulathuvayal comes under the Chakkittapara panchayat, Perambra block panchayat and Koyilandy Taluk.
Chakkittapara is a panchayat in the Kozhikode district of Kerala state, India.
Kottur is a grama panchayat and a community development block in the Kozhikode district of Kerala, India.

Peruvannamuzhi or Peruvannamoozhy is a village in Chakkittapara Panchayath Kozhikode district, Kerala, India. Peruvannamuzhi forms part of the newly inaugurated Malabar Wildlife Sanctuary and is rich in flora and fauna.
Koorachundu is a village towards the north east of Kozhikode district of Kerala in India.

Koothali is a village near Perambra in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India, and the traditional seat of the Koothali Nair. The name Koothali has evolved from two terms: Kooth + Ali, in which "Kooth" means performing arts like "Kathakali", "Koodiyattam", etc., and "Ali" means the venue where such art forms are performed.

Perambra is a major town in Koyilandy taluk of Kozhikode district in North Malabar region of Kerala state, India. Perambra is the anglicized form of the original name Payyormala, given during British rule.
Puttad(പുറ്റാട്) is a village in Koyilandy sub-district, about 5 km (3.1 mi) south of Perambra in Kozhikode district, Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal?
faq.a: The best time to visit St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal?
faq.a: Stays in St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St George Shrine Pilgrim Centre Kulathuvayal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kulathuvayal, Chakkittapara, Kottur, Kerala, Peruvannamuzhi, Koorachundu.
